raw_consumer_statement:
I received a letter in XXXX stating that my mortgage company had a data breach. The mortgage company is XXXX XXXX. My mortgage company is a sister company of that one. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a voice message from XXXX at Citibank involving my Citi Bank Thank You Preferred card ending in XXXX. We cancelled out that card./ The new credit card is ending in XXXX. The reference number was XXXX. She asked us if we authorized a balance transfer on that card. We said no we did not authorize any charges on that card. We received a statement with a credit on it for {$9900.00}. We received a letter on XX/XX/year>, from card member services saying that we were responsible and they closed their depute and we are responsible for a balance transfer in the amount of {$5500.00}. The balance transfer says that it was electronically transferred into a valid account or name of authorized user at XXXX Mastercard and visa. Any future requests for reembursement should be directed to XXXX Mastercard and visa. We did not make this transaction and do not have that money. We have been going through identity theft with a number of our cards. 

XXXX XXXX has our account in the fraud unit due to charges we did not make. They also changed the answer to the security question about mother 's maiden name. We would like to open up a dispute again because this was not us, and we do not know what XXXX account this was done to.
